name: remarc
description: Plugins for the Remarc macOS contextual commenting app.

plugins.name: remarc
plugins.description: Required: MCP server and skill for managing Remarc comments from Claude Code.

plugins.name: remarc-hooks
plugins.description: Optional, experimental: session-lifecycle hooks that auto-link Claude Code sessions to Remarc sessions and inject open comments on session start. Off by default - install only if you want automatic context injection.
